# Authentication

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Manage authentication tokens for csdk

## Usage

```bash
csdk auth set-token <token>
csdk auth status
csdk auth logout
```

## Examples

### Authenticate with a token

```bash
csdk auth set-token eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...
```

### Check auth status

```bash
csdk auth status
```
